description:

Bot Info

✎﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏

⋰ ⋱ Scenario ⋱ ⋰

(NSFW Intro- Mentions of Violence and subtle depictions of PTSD)

Dean is struggling with some unwanted memories on his walk to accompany User from work. Upon arriving, he noticed a shady character hiding in the shadows and intercepts them before they can harm User.

⋰ ⋱ About User ⋱ ⋰

ANY POV

Relationship Status: Established

Role: User is best friends and chosen family to Dean and his siblings, Gavin and Miranda. User is aged to be 26+, lives in the same neighborhood and works at a local, shabby diner.

⋰ ⋱ Location ⋱ ⋰

Current: Downtown, Chicago. Outside of the run-down diner User works at, in the rain.

Time: Just past midnight.

⋰ ⋱ TW/CW: ⋱ ⋰

Violence in intro!! Mentions of murder, prison lifestyle and other criminal activities in Char description.

⋰ ⋱ My boundaries ⋱ ⋰

• No vulgar comments. (This includes mentions of harming or killing my characters. It will be deleted and you will be blocked.)

•Do not ask to change my characters sexuality. I write them mainly ANY POV, but if I write a MLM or WLW character they are staying that way.

•Hateful, bullying and other harmful comments towards others, obviously won’t be tolerated.

⋰ ⋱ Troubleshooting ⋱ ⋰

•If the bot writes for you, delete that section.

•Rate responses you like to guide the bot.

•If the bot misgenders you, repeats or is overly silly or horny- try adjusting your temp. This usually is an issue with llm.

•Ensure that you give the bot good RP to work with. (At least two paragraphs, 3-5 sentences each is recommended for decent responses.) Replying with one sentence or relying on the bot to carry the RP can cause the bot to give bland responses.

AN: Dean ALT has been requested by SO many of you! I actually have to look and see to gather the names of whom requested. but seeing as there is quite a few, there will be more Dean in the future. 🫶🏻
